recommendations.title: Conduct Board Governance Review by 2026-06-30
recommendations.description: Perform a comprehensive governance review focusing on committee composition and independence tests by 2026-06-30 to sustain RBI and SEBI confidence and avoid regulatory scrutiny. Company Secretary and Compliance Head to coordinate.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹4.1 Cr potential loss from renewed RBI/SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Competitors enhanced board independence post-crisis to maintain ESG ratings

audit_trail.ref: Risk of renewed RBI/SEBI scrutiny if governance momentum lost

audit_trail.value: ERM maturity affects board oversight and regulatory compliance

recommendations.title: Implement Quarterly SEBI Corporate Governance Reporting
recommendations.description: Ensure timely submission of SEBI quarterly corporate governance reports starting Q1 FY26 by 2026-07-15 to maintain transparency and avoid trading restrictions. Compliance team to establish process and controls.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid ₹4.1 Cr loss from potential SEBI trading restrictions and cost of capital increase
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Top banks maintain strict SEBI reporting to sustain ESG ratings

audit_trail.value: SEBI quarterly corporate governance report deadline and impact

audit_trail.ref: Risk of trading restrictions due to non-disclosure

recommendations.title: Issue ₹500 Cr Green Bond by 2026-09-30
recommendations.description: Leverage YES BANK's improved ESG profile and governance overhaul to issue a ₹500 Cr green bond by 2026-09-30, capturing an estimated ₹4.1 Cr upside and reducing cost of capital by 20-40 bps per BRSR guidelines. CFO to lead issuance with ESG and treasury teams.
recommendations.profitability_link: ₹4.1 Cr ESG-driven upside and 20-40 bps cost of capital reduction on ₹500 Cr issuance
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Peer banks issued green bonds capturing 15-25% valuation premium

audit_trail.ref: ₹4.1 Cr ESG upside and ₹500 Cr green bond opportunity
audit_trail.value: Article headline and top opportunity section
BRSR linkage to cost of capital reduction and green bond issuance

recommendations.title: Host Investor Briefing on ESG Turnaround by 2026-07-15
recommendations.description: Organize a detailed investor briefing by 2026-07-15 to communicate the governance reforms, ESG improvements, and green bond plans, enhancing stewardship narrative and attracting ESG fund inflows. Head of Investor Relations to lead.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential to increase ESG fund inflows by 5-10%, enhancing valuation premium by ₹10-20 Cr
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Peers improved ESG fund inflows post-governance briefings

audit_trail.ref: Leverage governance turnaround to accelerate ESG fund inflows
